title: 10 best herbal creams for endometriosis pain
description: Wild yam creams helps with endometriosis pain because they contain saponins, a natural compound that mimics the hormone progesterone. This can help to reduce inflammation and relax uterine muscle contractions, thereby alleviating menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with endometriosis. The cream also increases prostaglandin levels, which can help to soften and thin the uterus lining, making menstruation more manageable and reducing the severity of pain. Regular use...
